caption: 周五五点又加需求。
scene: Sage seated at a small desk facing a single laptop with a tiny chat bubble popping up on screen, a small wall clock above showing 5:00, his mouth a perfectly flat unbothered line, one paw resting still on the desk, a tiny sweat drop near his temple.
bible_hook: §2 The PM adds scope on Friday at 5pm. Sage keeps a straight face.
rationale: Anchors to Sage's design-work pressure this week and holds the §2.5 tension via the deadpan composure; differs from recent posts by using the Friday-scope-creep moment with a clock-and-chat-bubble motif not seen in the last 30 days.
